No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly teaches how to describe symptoms at a hospital (Week 12, 13), directly supporting access to health-care services (Target 3.8).
evidence: 病院で簡単に症状を話す
体調が悪くなった時症状を簡単に話して

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops relevant language skills for life and work (Target 4.4).
evidence: 培養初級日語聽說能力
奠定良好的日語學習基礎

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to develop language skills for 'work' and includes 'travel Japanese', which tangentially supports decent work (Target 8.5) and sustainable tourism (Target 8.9).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Cultivating 'international perspective and mobility' (Core Competence D) can be inferred to support Target 10.7 by facilitating orderly movement of people.
evidence: 培養學生具備國際觀、國際移動力

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course teaches 'asking for directions' and understanding 'rules in public places' (Week 8, 10), which relates to navigating and utilizing urban services (Targets 11.2, 11.7).
evidence: 公共の場所での注意を聞き取る

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to climate change.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Discussions on 'rules and manners' (Week 17) and understanding 'Japanese society and culture' (Core Competence C) offer a minimal, indirect contribution to peaceful societies.
evidence: 知曉日本社會與歷史文化

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing 'international perspective and mobility' and 'cross-disciplinary skills' (Core Competence D) provides foundational skills for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
evidence: 培養學生具備國際觀、國際移動力
